testcase.name: testSelectHomeCheckbox
testcase.system-out: 14:42:10 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - === Starting CheckBoxTest suite === 14:42:11 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - Setting up page for CheckBoxTest 14:42:11 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Initializing CheckBoxPage locators 14:42:11 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Navigating to CheckBox page 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - Running test: testSelectHomeCheckbox 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Tree already expanded on page load - skipping expand 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Selecting Home checkbox 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Result display visible: true 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Selected result displayed: You have selected : home desktop documents downloads notes commands workspace office wordFile excelFile react angular veu public private classified general 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - ✅ Test passed - result: You have selected : home desktop documents downloads notes commands workspace office wordFile excelFile react angular veu public private classified general 14:42:13 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/end_testSelectHomeCheckbox_20260321_144213.png 14:42:14 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/end_testSelectHomeCheckbox_20260321_144213.png 14:42:14 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - Closing page after: Selecting Home checkbox selects all children

testcase.name: testNoResultBeforeSelection
testcase.system-out: 14:42:14 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - Setting up page for CheckBoxTest 14:42:14 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Initializing CheckBoxPage locators 14:42:14 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.CheckBoxPage - Navigating to CheckBox page 14:42:16 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - Running test: testNoResultBeforeSelection 14:42:16 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - ✅ Test passed - no result shown before selection 14:42:16 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Capturing screenshot: target/screenshots/end_testNoResultBeforeSelection_20260321_144216.png 14:42:16 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.pages.BasePage - Screenshot saved and attached to Allure report: target/screenshots/end_testNoResultBeforeSelection_20260321_144216.png 14:42:16 [INFO ] com.qa.learning.tests.CheckBoxTest - Closing page after: Result section not visible before any selection
